title: Bump Builder image ComfyUI core to v0.27.0 (parity with the model-wave bump)
description: FOLLOW-UP to MPI-139 (global ComfyUI v0.25.1→v0.26.0 bump). RETARGETED 2026-07-02 from v0.26.0 → v0.27.0: the app is entering a regular model-integration cadence (Krea2, NVIDIA PiD, Boogu, Lens, Ernie, Ideogram) and v0.27.0 is the researched floor that clears the whole wave (Krea2 merge node + Ideogram bbox/JSON prompt both need 0.27; PiD/Lens=0.23, Boogu=0.26, Ernie=0.19). No breaking changes for our stack. The Builder authoring image (mpi-ci/cubric-vision-builder/Dockerfile, ARG COMFYUI_REF=eca4757…=v0.25.1) must move to v0.27.0 (commit bb131be9e83d2f773c90f1d6f1e4b248a498c8c5) so workflows authored on the Builder match the app/Pod core. Local dev ComfyUI (G:/ComfyUi) already updated to v0.27.0 on 2026-07-02 (Pod image still 0.26 — separate bump). STILL DEFERRED — may not use the Builder soon. When picked up: bump COMFYUI_REF in cubric-vision-builder/Dockerfile, rebuild the Builder image (cu130, LOCAL-only — overflows CI), re-run install_nodes.sh, confirm the node set + LTX workflow load on 0.27. Edit mpi-ci with `git -C c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci` (separate repo). Keep kornia 0.8.2 pin. BRANCH: RunPod / mpi-ci only.
